_comment: Final ensemble: 3 neural snapshots with convex weights fit on validation. model.pt and model_quartile.pt predict arousal directly; model_q48dev.pt predicts y - trial_mean on a 48x48 topomap and is re-centred to the training mean at inference. Each model carries its own norm_stats (*.norm.npz) and IDW kernel (*.idw.npz). After blending: Gaussian smoothing sigma=0.5 within each trial, then per-trial variance calibration k=1.318 (corrects ensemble underconfidence).
